data.text:
The `ExamResult` interface uses `SkillBand` but the import instruction says only import `type ExamResult`. Since the interface references SkillBand, it should be resolved via the type-only import of ExamResult itself (structural typing - I just need ExamResult). Actually with `noUncheckedIndexedAccess` and strict, importing `type ExamResult` should be fine since I only reference `ExamResult` in my code, not `SkillBand` directly.

# AGENTS.md — Marketing Hub (marketing-hub)

Marketing Hub — All-in-One Marketing Command Center. A Next.js + React application.

## Stack
- Next.js + React (28 dependencies)

- `data/` and `docs/` hold content and documentation

## Common commands
- `npm run dev` — local dev server
- `npm run build` — production build
- `npm run start` — serve the production build
- `npm run lint` — lint
- `npm run seed` — seed local data
